targets.label: pdg-w-boson-mass
targets.citation: S. Navas et al. (Particle Data Group), Phys. Rev. D 110, 030001 (2024) and 2025 update.
targets.notes: PDG quoted world average for W mass. Not active in the reference benchmark campaign until a validated mapping and calibration produce physical-w-boson-mass-gev.

targets.label: pdg-z-boson-mass
targets.citation: S. Navas et al. (Particle Data Group), Phys. Rev. D 110, 030001 (2024) and 2025 update.
targets.notes: PDG quoted Z mass average. Not active in the reference benchmark campaign until a validated mapping and calibration produce physical-z-boson-mass-gev.

targets.label: pdg-higgs-mass
targets.citation: S. Navas et al. (Particle Data Group), Phys. Rev. D 110, 030001 (2024) and 2025 update.
targets.notes: PDG quoted Higgs mass average. Not active in the reference benchmark campaign until a validated scalar excitation mapping and calibration exist.

targets.label: pdg-w-z-mass-ratio
targets.citation: S. Navas et al. (Particle Data Group), Phys. Rev. D 110, 030001 (2024) and 2025 update.
targets.notes: PDG quoted W/Z mass ratio. This may be a better first physical comparison than absolute masses because it is dimensionless, but it still requires a validated W/Z mode-identification mapping.
